Alzheimer's Microbial Data Center. The Center will provide a central location for 
all Alzheimer's disease research, including the development of new diagnostic 
test methods, the development of new therapeutics, and the development of 
new diagnostic tools. The Center will also provide a central location for the 
coordination of research activities among the many research groups within the

Quality Sleep Your quality of sleep is much more important than how much you sleep. 

The average person needs 7.5 hours of sleep each night. 

If you are not getting this amount of sleep, you are not getting the benefits you 
deserve. 

The following are some tips to help you get the rest you need. 

1.  Get a good night's sleep. 
2.  Avoid caffeine and alcohol. 
3.  Exercise regularly. 
4.  Meditate. 
5.  Get plenty of sleep. 
6.  Get plenty of rest. 
7.  Don't worry about it. 

If you have any questions, please feel free to call me at x3-6992. 

Thanks,

Theatre at Southeastern to host KCACTF's annual Holiday Open House

Theatre at Southeastern will host the annual Holiday Open House on
November 15, 2001 from 11:00 a.m. - 1:00 p.m.

The Open House will be held at the Main Stage Theatre, located at
the corner of Westheimer and Shepherd.

The Open House will feature a variety of activities for the
families of the Houston Symphony Orchestra and Houston Ballet.

The Open House will be held on the third floor of the Theatre
at Southeastern.

For more information, contact the Houston Symphony at 713-853-7802 or
Houston Ballet at 713-345-7802.

For more information on the KCACTF, contact the Executive Committee at
713-853-7802 or e-mail at executive@kcathouston.org.

For more information on the Houston Symphony Orchestra, contact the Director of Music
at 713-853-7802 or e-mail at director@houstonsymphony.org.

For more information on the Houston Ballet, contact the General Manager at 713-345-7802 or
e-mail at gm@h

We are pleased to announce that we have appointed John Sherriff as our

has been responsible for the development of Enron's wholesale and 
retail businesses.  John will be responsible for the day-to-day operations 
of Enron's wholesale businesses, including the development and execution of 
strategic business plans, the development and execution of new business 
opportunities, and the development and execution of new business relationships.  
John will also be responsible for the overall management of Enron's retail 
business.  John will report to the Office of the Chairman.
